content.name: DataTransformerAgent
content.description: Transform and clean datasets for analytics

messages.content: Clean and normalize the employee dataset, then summarize the results

content.delta:
Please provide the employee dataset you want cleaned and normalized, either as CSV or JSON.

Once you share it, I can clean it and summarize results such as:

- Number of records processed
- Missing or invalid values found
- Duplicate employees removed
- Standardized fields, such as names, emails, departments, job titles, dates, salaries
- Any normalization applied
- Final cleaned dataset summary

messages.content: Clean and normalize the employee dataset, then summarize the results

content.name: DataTransformerAgent
content.description: Transform and clean datasets for analytics

content.delta:
Please provide the employee dataset you want cleaned and normalized, either as CSV or JSON.

You can paste it directly here, for example:

```csv
employee_id,name,email,department,salary,start_date
1, Jane Doe ,JANE.DOE@EXAMPLE.COM, HR,60000,01/15/2022
```

Once you send it, I’ll clean and normalize it, then summarize the results.

content.name: DataTransformerAgent
content.description: Transform and clean datasets for analytics

messages.content: Clean and normalize the employee dataset, then summarize the results

content.delta:
Please provide the employee dataset you want cleaned and normalized.

You can paste it here as CSV or JSON, or describe where it is stored. Once I have it, I can clean it and summarize results such as:

- Rows processed
- Missing or invalid values found
- Duplicate employees removed
- Standardized names, emails, departments, job titles, dates, salaries, etc.
- Any data quality issues remaining
- A cleaned preview of the dataset

messages.content: Clean and normalize the employee dataset, then summarize the results

content.name: DataTransformerAgent
content.description: Transform and clean datasets for analytics

content.delta:
Please provide the employee dataset you want cleaned and normalized.

You can paste it here as CSV or JSON, or describe where it is located. Once you provide it, I can clean it and summarize results such as:

- Duplicate records removed
- Missing values handled
- Standardized names, emails, departments, job titles
- Normalized dates, phone numbers, salaries, IDs
- Data quality issues found
- Final row/column counts
- Summary statistics and key observations

messages.content: Clean and normalize the employee dataset, then summarize the results

content.name: DataTransformerAgent
content.description: Transform and clean datasets for analytics

content.delta:
Please provide the employee dataset you want cleaned and normalized, preferably as CSV or JSON.

Once you share it, I can:
- Clean missing or inconsistent values
- Normalize names, emails, dates, departments, job titles, salaries, etc.
- Remove duplicates
- Standardize formats
- Summarize the results, including row counts, cleaned fields, detected issues, and key dataset statistics.
